sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n565" key="a)gkli/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγκλίνω</orth>, and <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄγκλιμα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀνακλ-.</foreign> </entryFree>
